summary: Added US-843 integration coverage in src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts that drives chooseAiAction plus applyAction through representative bidding, contract ordering, widow pickup, discard, whist, all-pass, misere, contract play, settlement, and next-deal scenarios with deterministic fixtures. Also strengthened src/test/integrationHarness.ts so auto-turn smoke failures include seed, step, phase, actor, legal action keys, chosen action, and trace context for reproducible stuck/illegal-action diagnostics. Targeted integration commands and full npm run verify both passed.

tests_run.evidence: Initial red run exposed an incorrect ten-level transition expectation and missing harness reproduction diagnostics; green run passed 2 integration tests after aligning the transition assertion and enriching harness failure payloads.

tests_run.command: npm run test -- src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: 3 integration-oriented files passed with 9/9 tests, covering the new AI legality scenarios, existing deterministic harness behavior, and the US-842 rule-flow baseline.
Vitest passed 12 files / 111 tests and the production build completed successfully with tsc and vite build.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.notes: No backend or live API applies; evidence is local deterministic Vitest integration coverage against the domain engine and harness.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI chooses an action from the legal set and applyAction accepts it across bidding, contract order, widow pickup, discard, whist decision, all-pass play, misere play, contract play, deal settlement, and next-deal states.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts; npm run test -- src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: Coverage is deterministic and representative rather than an exhaustive bullet-completion matrix.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI decisions reflect current phase and rule context instead of a phase-blind fallback across bidding, whist, all-pass, misere, and contract play fixtures.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts scenario assertions for non-first bidding choice, ten-level check, six-spades whist legality, misere/all-pass/contract play distinction, and follow-suit enforcement.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Assertions stay at legality and phase-context level and intentionally do not freeze a full DOS-style strategy profile.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given legal actions exist for an AI actor, AI selects one without throwing and the rules engine applies it without error.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts legality/applyAction matrix; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: The test suite exercises representative fixtures rather than every possible seat/hand permutation.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Across bidding, whist, contract play, all-pass, and misere scenarios, AI decisions remain phase-aware and do not collapse to a generic first-legal-action policy.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Phase-awareness is demonstrated with targeted fixture contrasts rather than exhaustive cross-seed behavioral snapshots.

evidence_matrix.scenario: When the AI auto-turn harness goes illegal, failure output contains seed, phase, actor, legal action keys, chosen action, and trace context for reproduction.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts illegal-harness diagnostic assertion; src/test/integrationHarness.ts failure-message wrapping
evidence_matrix.limitations: Diagnostics are local thrown-error payloads; no external telemetry pipeline exists in this project scope.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: This gate verifies the targeted integration surface before the broader suite, not the whole repository alone.
Verification is local deterministic test/build evidence; no backend/live service path applies.
Observability coverage is limited to thrown reproduction context because there is no external logger or telemetry sink.
This task contributes the integration-test slice of the US-843 release gate and does not replace adjacent unit or broader US completion evidence.
